title: Strange Ocean
description:
Explore the weirdest waterways as you help Marina chart the seas, collect hidden treasures and floating chests, and then use your new found riches to customize your ship!

Join the quirky ship captain Marina as she sets sail through a strange ocean!

A charming, hand-animated ship captain: Marina!

Nothing can sink your ship if you leap over it!

Deftly defy wibblety-wobblety gravity!

Sail the wildest waterways ever found as they twist and turn in unpredictable ways.

Unique power-ups that will make your head spin.

Multiple modes of play from challenge modes to bizarre features such as turning all projectiles into ducks. 

100 surreal stages that just get stranger-and-stranger.

10 boss stages that will challenge and bewilder.

40 unlockable ship parts to customize your voyage.
description_short: Jump geysers in the goofiest gravity, speed under sharks on the silliest seas, and shoot down dangerous pirates with ducks! Join the exuberant Captain Marina as you set sail together in Strange Ocean!
